title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kanpur - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kanpur - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
